chapter_title.en: Chapter on Travelling for Hajj and Other Acts of Obedience

text: 2388 - وَ رَوَى جَعْفَرُ بْنُ بَشِيرٍ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ اَلْفَضْلِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «إِذَا سَبَّبَ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ لِعَبْدٍ اَلرِّزْقَ فِي أَرْضٍ جَعَلَ لَهُ فِيهَا حَاجَةً».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2388 - Ja'far ibn Bashir narrated from Ibrahim ibn al-Fadl, from Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) who said:
"When Allah (swt), the Glorious and Majestic, decrees sustenance for a servant in a particular land, He creates a need for him in that land."
